calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For An Order Determining Interest In Community Property And Directing Life Insurance Receipient(S) To Transfer Community Property Portion To
Off Calendar Mar-26-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Hanlen J. Chang for James A. Kushner, Petitioner (via Zoom).
James P. Lamping for James Abbenhuys, Objector (via Zoom).

The Court noted that a related trust petition had been filed with a hearing date set in May and proposed taking the amended petition off calendar. No party objected, and the Court ordered the amended petition off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Trust Litigation
Off Calendar Mar-26-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION Petition For An Order Determining Interest In Community Property And Directing Life Insurance Receipient(S) To Transfer Community Property Portion To
Off Calendar Feb-26-2025 Continued To Mar-26-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Hanlen Chang, Esq., for James Kushner, Petitioner.

James Lamping, Esq., for James Abbenhuys, Objector.

Evan Gologorsky, Esq., for Carol Jensen, Trustee.

At the outset, the court advises that this matter appears to be a Trust matter and should be filed as such. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the court's advisement. Mr. Lamping advises that the parties will file the matter as a Trust case if needed but requests that the court consider a continuance of this matter to allow the parties to meet and confer regarding the preceding and possible settlement discussions. No objection to Mr. Lamping's suggestion is presented.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Mar-26-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. A Status hearing on the Filing of Trust Litigation shall be set for the same date and time.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Loke. Not Reported.
